title: Financial requirements for the Family Visa route
body: "  This page is for people who have received a letter about participating in the research the MAC has commissioned. Letters have been sent to a random sample of people who have applied for the family visa.   The Home Office is contacting individuals who currently are or have been sponsored by their partner in the past 5 years on the family visa route on the MAC’s behalf.  The documents above provide further information about the survey and interviews for those who have been selected to participate in the research.  Participation in the survey and interview is voluntary and will not impact your visa status with the Home Office either now or in the future. "
